title: Fix directive status mapping + dev environment cleanup

tasks.title: Fix mapStatus() in directive-watcher.ts
tasks.scope: Add 'active' -> 'in_progress', 'reopened' -> 'in_progress', 'superseded' -> 'completed' to mapStatus(). Also add 'active' and 'reopened' to readCurrentState() raw status filter (line 234). Remove dead 'reopened' from post-mapStatus filters in readActiveDirectives() and readAndUpdate().

dod.criterion: readActiveDirectives() and readAndUpdate() only check mapped statuses (no dead 'reopened')

tasks.title: Fix directive.json files using invalid status values
tasks.scope: Change status 'active' to 'in_progress' in gruai-marketing-launch/directive.json and any other directives using non-schema statuses.

dod.criterion: No directive.json files use status 'active' (all normalized)

tasks.title: Add predev script to prevent stale process conflicts
tasks.scope: Add a 'predev' npm script to package.json that kills any existing processes on port 4444 and existing vite dev servers before starting. This prevents the zombie tsx-watch + port conflict issue where multiple npm run dev instances create stale, fragmented processes.

dod.criterion: package.json has a 'predev' script that kills processes on port 4444
predev also kills stale vite processes for this project
npm run dev runs predev automatically before starting
